en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Command the people of Israel, and say to them, When you enter the land of Canaan (this is the land that shall fall to you for an inheritance, the land of Canaan as defined by its borders),
zh: “你要吩咐以色列人說：‘你們進了迦南地的時候，歸你們作產業的迦南地及它的四境就是以下這些地區。

en: your south side shall be from the wilderness of Zin alongside Edom, and your southern border shall run from the end of the Salt Sea on the east.
zh: 你們南面的地區要從尋的曠野，貼著以東邊界；你們的南界要從鹽海東面的盡頭起；

en: And your border shall turn south of the ascent of Akrabbim, and cross to Zin, and its limit shall be south of Kadesh-barnea. Then it shall go on to Hazar-addar, and pass along to Azmon.
zh: 你們的邊界要轉到亞克拉濱坡的南邊，經過尋，直達加低斯．巴尼亞的南邊，又出到哈薩．亞達，過到押們；

en: And the border shall turn from Azmon to the Brook of Egypt, and its limit shall be at the sea.
zh: 你們的邊界要從押們轉到埃及河，直達到海。

en: "For the western border, you shall have the Great Sea and its coast. This shall be your western border.
zh: “‘西界方面，你們有大海和海岸；這要作你們的西界。

en: "This shall be your northern border: from the Great Sea you shall draw a line to Mount Hor.
zh: “‘你們的北界如下：從大海起畫界，直到何珥山；

en: From Mount Hor you shall draw a line to Lebo-hamath, and the limit of the border shall be at Zedad.
zh: 從何珥山起畫界，直到哈馬口，使邊界直到西達達；

en: Then the border shall extend to Ziphron, and its limit shall be at Hazar-enan. This shall be your northern border.
zh: 這邊界再伸到西斐崙，直到哈薩．以難；這要作你們的北界。

en: "You shall draw a line for your eastern border from Hazar-enan to Shepham.
zh: “‘你們要從哈薩．以難，畫到示番為東界。

en: And the border shall go down from Shepham to Riblah on the east side of Ain. And the border shall go down and reach to the shoulder of the Sea of Chinnereth on the east.
zh: 這邊界要從示番下到亞延東面的利比拉；這邊界要繼續伸展直達基尼烈湖的東邊。

en: And the border shall go down to the Jordan, and its limit shall be at the Salt Sea. This shall be your land as defined by its borders all around."
zh: 這邊界要下到約旦河，直到鹽海。這要作你們的土地四周的邊界。’”

en: Moses commanded the people of Israel, saying, "This is the land that you shall inherit by lot, which the LORD has commanded to give to the nine tribes and to the half-tribe.
zh: 摩西吩咐以色列人說：“這就是你們要抽籤承受為業之地，是耶和華吩咐給九個半支派的；

en: For the tribe of the people of Reuben by fathers' houses and the tribe of the people of Gad by their fathers' houses have received their inheritance, and also the half-tribe of Manasseh.
zh: 因為流本子孫的支派和迦得子孫的支派，按著父家已經取得了產業，瑪拿西的半個支派也取得了產業；

en: The two tribes and the half-tribe have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan east of Jericho, toward the sunrise."
zh: 這兩個半支派已經在耶利哥對面，約旦河東岸，向日出之地得了產業。”

en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "These are the names of the men who shall divide the land to you for inheritance: Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun.
zh: “這是要把地業分配給你們的人的名字：以利亞撒祭司和嫩的兒子約書亞。

en: You shall take one chief from every tribe to divide the land for inheritance.
zh: 你們又要從每支派中選出一個領袖，來幫助分配地業。

en: These are the names of the men: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
zh: 這些人的名字是：猶大支派有耶孚尼的兒子迦勒。

en: Of the tribe of the people of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.
zh: 西緬子孫的支派有亞米忽的兒子示母利。

en: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon.
zh: 便雅憫支派有基斯倫的兒子以利達。

en: Of the tribe of the people of Dan a chief, Bukki the son of Jogli.
zh: 但子孫的支派有一個領袖，是約利的兒子布基。

en: Of the people of Joseph: of the tribe of the people of Manasseh a chief, Hanniel the son of Ephod.
zh: 約瑟的後裔，瑪拿西子孫的支派有一個領袖，是以弗的兒子漢聶。

en: And of the tribe of the people of Ephraim a chief, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan.
zh: 以法蓮子孫的支派有一個領袖，是拾弗但的兒子基母利。

en: Of the tribe of the people of Zebulun a chief, Elizaphan the son of Parnach.
zh: 西布倫子孫的支派有一個領袖，是帕納的兒子以利撒番。

en: Of the tribe of the people of Issachar a chief, Paltiel the son of Azzan.
zh: 以薩迦子孫的支派有一個領袖，是阿散的兒子帕鐵。

en: And of the tribe of the people of Asher a chief, Ahihud the son of Shelomi.
zh: 亞設子孫的支派有一個領袖，是示羅米的兒子亞希忽。

en: Of the tribe of the people of Naphtali a chief, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.
zh: 拿弗他利子孫的支派有一個領袖，是亞米忽的兒子比大黑。”

en: These are the men whom the LORD commanded to divide the inheritance for the people of Israel in the land of Canaan."
zh: 這些人，就是耶和華所吩咐，把產業分給迦南地的以色列人的。
